title: Oscularia steenbergensis
taxonomy: Oscularia steenbergensis is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Aizoaceae. It is a succulent native to the Western Cape province of South Africa. Oscularia steenbergensis is further classified within the genus Oscularia, which consists of succulent plants with similar characteristics. The plant belongs to the order Caryophyllales, which includes other succulent and flowering plants. Oscularia steenbergensis is also classified as a member of the family Aizoaceae, along with other succulents commonly known as living stones or mesembs.
